Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Now that we've covered the Tactical Display and Camera Controls, let's discuss the Formation Manager at top left.

Formation Manager will show ALL available units under your command in the mission. You can double click on units here to snap to them immediately, and click and drag them to move individual units between formations (or out of formations entirely).
Since USS Gallery is the only unit currently under your control, it will be only unit that appears here. This will come in handy later on when you are controlling more than one unit.
